1_manual_corruption_setup.description: Cleared state, created 'Marketing Plan' strategy, manually edited thoughtflow-state.json to add 2 duplicates with different IDs but same name, reloaded state
1_manual_corruption_setup.expected: list_strategies shows 3 strategies with identical names
1_manual_corruption_setup.actual: After manual corruption and reload_state, list_strategies showed 3 strategies with identical name 'Marketing Plan': 'marketing plan', 'marketing plan duplicate 1', 'marketing plan duplicate 2'

2_execute_deduplication.expected: Tool completes successfully and reports how many duplicates were removed
2_execute_deduplication.actual: deduplicate_strategies completed successfully and reported removed: 2

3_verify_clean_state.expected: Only ONE instance of 'Marketing Plan' remains
3_verify_clean_state.actual: list_strategies showed only 1 strategy with name 'Marketing Plan' (id: 'marketing plan'). The remaining instance kept the properties of the first occurrence

4_tree_deduplication.description: Repeated manual corruption for Trees with identical goal, called deduplicate_trees
4_tree_deduplication.expected: Duplicate trees purged, leaving only one tree per unique normalized goal
4_tree_deduplication.actual: After manual corruption, list_trees showed 3 trees with identical goal 'Explore product features'. deduplicate_trees completed successfully and reported removed: 2. After deduplication, only 1 tree remained

5_idempotent_creation.description: Called create_strategy twice with exact same name 'Architecture Strategy'
5_idempotent_creation.expected: Second call does not create duplicate, returns ID of originally created strategy
5_idempotent_creation.actual: First create_strategy returned id: 'architecture strategy'. Second create_strategy with same name returned same id: 'architecture strategy' instead of creating a new duplicate. No duplicate created in list_strategies

6_verify_persistence.description: Waited for debounced save, checked thoughtflow-state.json
6_verify_persistence.actual: thoughtflow-state.json shows only 2 strategies: 'marketing plan' and 'architecture strategy'. Only 1 tree: 'explore-product-features'. All deduplication results persisted correctly

key_findings.manual_corruption: WORKING - Can manually corrupt state file with duplicates
key_findings.reload_state: WORKING - reload_state loads corrupted state into memory
key_findings.strategy_deduplication: WORKING - deduplicate_strategies removes duplicate strategies by normalized name
key_findings.tree_deduplication: WORKING - deduplicate_trees removes duplicate trees by normalized goal
key_findings.idempotent_creation: WORKING - create_strategy acts as get-or-create, returns existing ID on duplicate name
key_findings.persistence: WORKING - Deduplication results persist to thoughtflow-state.json
